## Problem

What user problem would this solve?

## Proposed Solution

What would you like PromptDeck to do?

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider?

## Impact

Check any that apply:

- [ ] User experience
- [ ] Prompt manager UI
- [ ] Autocomplete/helper UI
- [ ] Storage or schema
- [ ] Import/export
- [ ] Extension permissions
- [ ] Supported sites/providers
- [ ] Build or packaging

## Privacy Or Security Considerations

Would this require new permissions, remote services, sync, analytics, or access to more page content?

## Additional Context

Anything else that may help?
